title: cleidion claoxyloides
intro: Cleidion claoxyloides, also known as the Philippine pepper tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Cleidion claoxyloides can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
